admit_cards.title: Railway RRB Group D Answer Key 2026

acf.short_information: Railway Recruitment Boards (RRB), will be release the Answer Key on its official website for the Recruitment of RRB Group-D Exam 2026. The exam will be conducted 27 November 2025 - 10 February 2026, and the last date to submit the application form was 01 March 2025. Candidates Can Check their Answer Key using their Enrollment Number, Registration Number, or Date of Birth by logging into the portal. The direct link is provided below.

Notification Date : 28 December 2024
Online Apply Start Date : 23 January 2025
Online Apply Last Date : 01 March 2025
Last Date For Fee Payment : 03 March 2025
Correction date : 04-13 March 2025
Exam Date : 27 November 2025 - 16 January 2026 
Revised Exam Date : 08, 09 January 2026 and 02, 03, 04, 05, 06, 09 & 10 February 2026. 
Exam City Details : 19 November 2025
Admit Card : 24 November 2025
Answer Key : 17 February 2026 Today 05 PM
Result Date : Will Be Updated Here Soon
Candidates are advised to confirm from the RRB official website.

acf.eligibility: Candidates who have completed Class 10 (High School) from a school recognized by NCVT/SCVT or hold a National Apprenticeship Certificate (NAC) issued by NCVT are eligible to apply for the RRB Group D Recruitment Exam.
acf.marking_scheme:
Correct Answer : +1 mark.
Wrong Answer : -1/3 mark deduction.
acf.mode_of_selection:
Computer Based Test (CBT-1)
Physical Efficiency Test
Document Verification
Medical Examination
acf.how_to_steps:
Go to the official website of the Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) for the region where you applied.
On the homepage, find the Latest Updates / Candidate Information / Notifications section.
Look for the notification titled “RRB Group D Answer Key 2026.”
Click on the Answer Key link once it becomes active.
You may be asked to log in using your Registration Number / Roll Number and Date of Birth (or password).
After logging in, your provisional answer key and your recorded responses will be displayed.
Download the answer key PDF and save it to your device.
You can use the answer key to calculate your probable score before the results are announced.
acf.faq:
Question: When will the Railway RRB Group D Answer Key 2026 be conducted?
Answer: The exact answer key has announced in the official notification 2026.
Question: Who conducts the RRB Group D Exam?
Answer: The Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) conducts the exam across different regions in India.
Question: What posts are covered under RRB Group D recruitment?
Answer: Group D includes posts like Track Maintainer, Helper, Assistant Pointsman, and Level-1 staff in railways.
Question: How can I check the exam date for RRB Group D 2025?
Answer: Candidates can check the exam schedule on the official RRB regional websites and through the admit card.
Question: What is the official website for RRB?
Answer: The official website for RRB is https://indianrailways.gov.in/
